dailyNews.title: US-Iran talks in Pakistan: Who’s attending, what’s on the agenda?
dailyNews.description: Islamabad hosts negotiations as US and Iran seek off-ramp. But deep mistrust and regional tensions threaten talks.

dailyNews.title: Hate crimes surge in US: Anti-Sikh cases jump 3700% in decade; anti-Latino incidents rise 18%
dailyNews.description: Hate crimes against Sikhs and Latinos have seen a sharp increase in the US, preliminary data from the FBI revealed. Between 2015 and 2025, hate crimes incident against Sikhs have jumped 3700% while those against Latinos jumped 18%.

dailyNews.title: This founder helped build SpaceX’s most powerful rocket engine. Now he’s building a ‘fighter jet for orbit’
dailyNews.description: The company's novel rocket engine could be a game changer for the U.S. military.

dailyNews.title: Lebanon Latest: Israel kills hundreds in one day
dailyNews.description: Israel launches a wave of strikes in Lebanon that has killed hundreds, despite a US-Iran ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: 7-Eleven Owner Delays US Unit IPO As Revamp Needs Time
dailyNews.description: The average price for regular gasoline in the US exceeded $4 a gallon in April for the first time since August 2022, according to the American Automobile Association.

dailyNews.title: Middle East war: Hormuz tanker traffic unlikely to return to normal anytime soon despite 2-week truce; here's why
dailyNews.description: A day after the US and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire, maritime experts and analysts are now suggesting that the tanker traffic in the Strait of Hormuz is unlikely to return to normal anytime soon.

dailyNews.title: Amid US-Iran ceasefire, global voices call to extend truce to Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Lebanon declared a national day of mourning for victims of Israeli attacks as pressure mounted to expand the US-Iran ceasefire to include the Israel-Hezbollah conflict. Israeli strikes on Lebanon resulted in over 200 deaths, complicating diplomatic efforts for peace in the region.

dailyNews.title: Israeli strikes in Lebanon 'grave violation' of ceasefire, Iran minister tells BBC
dailyNews.description: Iran's deputy foreign minister says the US must choose between 'war and ceasefire'.

dailyNews.title: Karnataka bypolls at 3 pm: Bagalkot records 54.82% polling; voter turnout at 49.66% in Davanagere South
dailyNews.description: The polls were necessitated in Bagalkot and Davanagere South by the deaths of senior Congress MLAs H.Y. Meti and Shamanur Shivashankarappa respectively

dailyNews.title: Why Israel’s attacks on Lebanon could cripple US-Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Ceasefire dispute escalates as US and Israel exclude Lebanon, raising fears of a broader regional conflict.

dailyNews.title: CNN's Dana Bash says that objective reporting no longer means just 'giving all sides'
dailyNews.description: CNN's Dana Bash claimed objective reporting no longer means giving all sides, saying journalists must now explain when statements are false or misleading.

dailyNews.title: 'Superman' actress Valerie Perrine's official cause of death revealed: report
dailyNews.description: "Superman" actress Valerie Perrine's cause of death was acute cardiopulmonary arrest with Parkinson's disease as the underlying cause, a report says.

dailyNews.title: Homan warns Spanberger blocking access to Virginia jails could force more ICE street operations: 'Do the job'
dailyNews.description: Border czar Tom Homan blasts Virginia Gov. Abigail Spanberger over sanctuary policies, threatens to send more ICE teams into streets to enforce the law if necessary.

dailyNews.title: Minnesota fraud scandal: Sixth family member who met with AG Ellison set to plead guilty
dailyNews.description: A sixth family member is expected to plead guilty in a massive Minnesota fraud scheme that allegedly stole $14 million from a federal meal program.

dailyNews.title: Federal judge blocks Trump admin effort to end temporary protected status for Ethiopia
dailyNews.description: A Biden-nominated federal judge postponed the termination of Ethiopia's temporary protected status, pushing back against the Trump administration's TPS decision.

dailyNews.title: Debra Messing says anti-Israel activists’ Iran silence exposes ‘hypocrisy’
dailyNews.description: Debra Messing says anti-Israel activists are silent on Iran, calling it "the boldest example of hypocrisy" during a podcast with Jonah Platt.

dailyNews.title: CHAD WOLF: China's AI mockery shows the fight for the Americas is underway
dailyNews.description: China's use of AI propaganda against the U.S. signals a deeper geopolitical contest over technology dominance and influence across Latin America.

dailyNews.title: Brad Pitt accuses Angelina Jolie of dragging out $164M winery dispute as key evidence allegedly disappears
dailyNews.description: Angelina Jolie's team seeks to delay the $164 million Miraval winery trial, while Brad Pitt's lawyers claim key evidence is allegedly disappearing.

dailyNews.title: Fitness guru Jillian Michaels opens up about skipping school for Taco Bell runs during food addiction
dailyNews.description: Jillian Michaels opens up about her food addiction on Sean Hannity's podcast, revealing she used junk food as comfort even while losing weight.

dailyNews.title: Hasan Piker accuses Bill Maher of being an 'Islamophobe' and demonstrating 'anti-Blackness'
dailyNews.description: Twitch streamer Hasan Piker slams Democrats for refusing his show while appearing with Bill Maher, alleging a "double standard" on "Islamophobia."

dailyNews.title: Chief prosecutor behind Israel war crimes charges faces disciplinary action amid sexual misconduct allegations
dailyNews.description: ICC Chief Prosecutor Karim Khan faces disciplinary proceedings over alleged sexual misconduct after the Bureau of the Assembly of States Parties voted to move forward with action.

dailyNews.title: Oklahoma principal shot in leg is praised for tackling school shooter: 'He is a hero'
dailyNews.description: Pauls Valley High School Principal Kirk Moore tackled a 20-year-old former student armed with a gun, officials say, preventing a worse school tragedy in Oklahoma.

topStories.title: Trump slams NATO and allies, says they ‘don’t understand anything without pressure’
topStories.description: The remark signals his continued scepticism toward allied cooperation and burden-sharing within the NATO alliance.

topStories.title: Federal judge blocks Trump admin effort to end temporary protected status for Ethiopia
topStories.description: A Biden-nominated federal judge postponed the termination of Ethiopia's temporary protected status, pushing back against the Trump administration's TPS decision.

topStories.title: How Trump Purged Immigration Judges to Speed Up Deportations
topStories.description: Judges are ordering an unprecedented number of people deported after coming under significant pressure from the administration to do so or risk losing their jobs.

topStories.title: In a Deep Red Town In Pennsylvania, Locals Vent Over a Planned ICE Detention Center
topStories.description: The Tremont, Pa., area has roughly 2,000 residents and limited resources. The Trump administration plans to convert a warehouse there to hold nearly four times as many people.

topStories.title: On Truth Social, Trump Supporters Fume About Iran War
topStories.description: A growing chorus of disaffected Trump supporters is sounding off in the replies to his posts on the social media platform he founded.

topStories.title: On Social Media, Democratic Politicians Are Letting the F-Word Fly
topStories.description: Democratic politicians are swearing with glee. It is usually aimed at President Trump.

topStories.title: White House Secures Foreign Steel for Trump’s Ballroom Project
topStories.description: ArcelorMittal, a European steel maker, is donating tens of millions of dollars of foreign steel for President Trump’s new ballroom.

topStories.title: Climate Change Denial Sees a Resurgence in Trump’s Washington
topStories.description: A conference near the White House drew dozens of people who reject the scientific consensus on climate change. The mood was triumphant.

topStories.title: Trump's ceasefire with Iran mired in dispute over Israel's war in Lebanon
topStories.description: As Trump issues a new warning to Iran to comply with a tenuous two-week ceasefire, the two sides don't even seem to agree on the terms of the deal.

topStories.title: Trump issues new threats as Iran accuses U.S. and Israel of violating ceasefire
topStories.description: President Trump posted new threats on social media as questions linger about the fragile ceasefire with Iran. This comes as Israeli strikes in Lebanon threaten the negotiated 2-week lapse in the conflict. CBS News' Nancy Cordes and Elizabeth Palmer report.

topStories.title: New strikes in Middle East despite Iran ceasefire as officials look for long-term peace deal
topStories.description: Amid the two-week ceasefire with Iran, multiple nations in the Middle East reported new strikes on Wednesday. In Lebanon, Israel said it struck 100 Hezbollah targets in just 10 minutes. Pakistani officials who brokered the ceasefire insisted the deal included Lebanon, but Israel and the White House disagreed. Meanwhile, Iran says the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. Nancy Cordes has the latest.

topStories.title: Oil plunges on Iran ceasefire news, setting the stage for some relief on gas prices
topStories.description: Stocks roared higher after President Trump announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran. Oil prices fell sharply, and gas prices are expected to follow.

dailyNews.title: Trump slams NATO and allies, says they ‘don’t understand anything without pressure’
dailyNews.description: The remark signals his continued scepticism toward allied cooperation and burden-sharing within the NATO alliance.

dailyNews.description: A Biden-nominated federal judge postponed the termination of Ethiopia's temporary protected status, pushing back against the Trump administration's TPS decision.

dailyNews.description: Judges are ordering an unprecedented number of people deported after coming under significant pressure from the administration to do so or risk losing their jobs.

dailyNews.description: The Tremont, Pa., area has roughly 2,000 residents and limited resources. The Trump administration plans to convert a warehouse there to hold nearly four times as many people.

dailyNews.description: A growing chorus of disaffected Trump supporters is sounding off in the replies to his posts on the social media platform he founded.

dailyNews.description: ArcelorMittal, a European steel maker, is donating tens of millions of dollars of foreign steel for President Trump’s new ballroom.

dailyNews.title: Climate Change Denial Sees a Resurgence in Trump’s Washington
dailyNews.description: A conference near the White House drew dozens of people who reject the scientific consensus on climate change. The mood was triumphant.

dailyNews.title: Trump's ceasefire with Iran mired in dispute over Israel's war in Lebanon
dailyNews.description: As Trump issues a new warning to Iran to comply with a tenuous two-week ceasefire, the two sides don't even seem to agree on the terms of the deal.

dailyNews.title: Trump issues new threats as Iran accuses U.S. and Israel of violating ceasefire
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted new threats on social media as questions linger about the fragile ceasefire with Iran. This comes as Israeli strikes in Lebanon threaten the negotiated 2-week lapse in the conflict. CBS News' Nancy Cordes and Elizabeth Palmer report.

dailyNews.title: New strikes in Middle East despite Iran ceasefire as officials look for long-term peace deal
dailyNews.description: Amid the two-week ceasefire with Iran, multiple nations in the Middle East reported new strikes on Wednesday. In Lebanon, Israel said it struck 100 Hezbollah targets in just 10 minutes. Pakistani officials who brokered the ceasefire insisted the deal included Lebanon, but Israel and the White House disagreed. Meanwhile, Iran says the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. Nancy Cordes has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Oil plunges on Iran ceasefire news, setting the stage for some relief on gas prices
dailyNews.description: Stocks roared higher after President Trump announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran. Oil prices fell sharply, and gas prices are expected to follow.

dailyNews.title: How Trump's tax law boosts the wealthy and leaves behind some workers he promised to help
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump pledged “no tax on tips, no tax on overtime, no tax on Social Security.” For some who are filing their taxes this year, the reality is different.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. ready for 'next conquest,' warns military to remain near Iran until 'real agreement' is honored
dailyNews.description: The statement came a day after Washington and Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan, which halted six weeks of fighting.

dailyNews.title: 'Poorly run, piece of ice': Trump targets Greenland again as Iran war deepens NATO rift
dailyNews.description: Trump has set his eyes on Greenland again while venting frustration at NATO, as the diplomatic fallout from Iran war exposed rifts in the security alliance.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Trump vows 'bigger, and better' Iran attacks if deal not reached
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: Tako? Takou? TACO-ru? Decoding the Trump TACO meme around the world.
dailyNews.description: A Washington Post reporter’s doctor in Seoul had a question — how to translate “chicken out,” as in “Trump always chickens out,” into Korean?

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court remade by Trump ushers in historic defeats for civil rights
dailyNews.description: The court is the first since at least the ’50s to reject claims in a majority of cases involving women and minorities, an analysis conducted for The Post shows.

dailyNews.title: White House struggles to prop up truce marked by confusion, contradictions
dailyNews.description: As the Trump administration claimed success, Tehran disputed the terms, shipping through the Strait of Hormuz remained stalled, and new questions emerged.

dailyNews.title: Trump vents at NATO but avoids rupture after meeting with alliance’s leader
dailyNews.description: The president, long a NATO skeptic, has been especially angry at alliance members in recent weeks for declining to take part in the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran.
